meaning: n.最低限要求者,最低纲领主义者
examples: The stores have all the hallmarks of a legitimate Apple outlet, completing with glossy hardwood tables and minimalist staircases.
The robot rats were quite minimalist, resembling a chunkier version of a computer mouse with wheels to move around and colorful markings.
So, I hear you're a minimalist.
It too serves nothing but hand-brewed coffee and espresso in utterly stripped back and minimalist surroundings.
These minimalist boxes of striped pinewood are open for their third season and took five years to construct.
